concerns.text: T018 marked [P] (parallel-safe) but depends on US1 cleaned data from T013. Descriptor computation cannot run until data ingestion/cleaning completes. Remove [P] tag or clarify it's parallel only within US2 after US1 foundation.
T026 marked [P] (parallel-safe) but depends on US2 computed descriptors from T018-T022. Regression modeling cannot run until descriptors are computed. Remove [P] tag.

T026 and T027 both implement src/analysis/regression.py - same file conflict. T026 does 5-fold CV, T027 does held-out test evaluation. These should be combined into one task or split into separate files to avoid implementation conflict.
T011 (fetch_structures.py) and T012 (fetch_thermal.py) fetch from independent sources (Materials Project API vs literature/NIST CSVs) and can run in parallel. Add [P] tag to both tasks.

Test tasks listed before implementation tasks within each US block. While TDD is valid, clarify in task descriptions that tests are written to FAIL first, then implementation follows. Consider reordering to show implementation before tests for clarity.
